**A Sustainable Research and Recreation Hub** \\
\\
The BIO-GREENERGY LAB Mondulkiri is a 100-hectare project that prioritizes the preservation of biodiversity while providing research opportunities and recreational facilities, including a central building and a treetop walk.](https://www.khamsagroup.com/projects/a_sustainable_research_and_recreation_hub)

Read More

[![Mondulkiri Industrial Food Park, Cambodia](https://www.khamsagroup.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadmin.khamsagroup.com%2Fassets%2Fd645dfe3-a9a8-487b-9204-e08cd2bf3438&w=1200&q=95)\\
**Mondulkiri Industrial Food Park, Cambodia** \\
\\
Mondulkiri is Cambodia’s largest and most sparsely populated province, containing an area of 14,288 km² (5,517 sq mi) with elevations ranging from 190 to 1,000 metres (620 to 3,280 ft).](https://www.khamsagroup.com/projects/mondulkiri_industrial_food_park_cambodia)

Read More

**God Head Resort Mondulkiri** \\
\\
Located 20 km from Krong Saen Monourom, the 100ha site features stunning mountain and forest scenery. Its rich biodiversity offers great potential for developing a natural resort in the area.](https://www.khamsagroup.com/projects/god_head_resort_mondulkiri)

metadata.og:title: Khamsa Group of Businesses (KGB)

data.summary: Khamsa Group of Businesses is a Cambodian holding company focused on innovation and creativity across various sectors. They aim to build a sustainable future through investments in technology, agriculture, and real estate. The group has over 5 partners, 10 subsidiaries, and has invested over $3 million. Key projects include the BIO-GREENERGY LAB, Mondulkiri Industrial Food Park, and Sealandair Marine Smart City. Their investment portfolio spans AI, robotics, aerospace, clean technology, and more, emphasizing sustainable development and community support.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
